steps.title: Recognize the pattern in the expression
steps.content: Observe that $-18 - 2x$ can be rewritten as $-2(9 + x)$: $$-18 - 2x = -2(9 + x)$$ This allows us to use the given equation directly.

steps.title: Substitute the given value and calculate
steps.content: Since $9 + x = 6$, we substitute: $$-2(9 + x) = -2(6) = -12$$ That matches choice A — A is correct.
